name: PT Trisula Textile Industries Tbk
summary: PT Trisula Textile Industries Tbk manufactures, distributes, and retails textile products in Indonesia. The company provides polyester fabrics for formal jackets and pants, suiting, and uniforms for men and women; fabrics for office and career wear collection; fabrics for tropical weather; and fabrics for apparel and accessories, such as hats, ties, scarves, shoes, belts, and others. It offers its products under the BELLINI and CATERINA brand names. The company also exports its products to Singapore, Thailand, Vietnam, Sri Lanka, India, Japan, the United States, Brazil, Mexico, Colombia, Australia, the United Kingdom, and the Middle East. PT Trisula Textile Industries Tbk was founded in 1968 and is headquartered in Cimahi, Indonesia. PT Trisula Textile Industries Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Inti Nusa Damai.
